languages.text: "Сожалею, но информация, которую вы ищете, лежит за пределами доступного мирянину контура знания".
"Regrettably, the information you seek lies outside the circuit of knowledge accessible to the laity."
languages.original_text: "Сожалею, но информация, которую вы ищете, лежит за пределами доступного мирянину контура знания".

traits.locale_text: "Regrettably, the information you seek lies outside the circuit of knowledge accessible to the laity."
"Regrettably, the information you seek lies outside the circuit of knowledge accessible to the laity."
"Regrettably, the information you seek lies outside the circuit of knowledge accessible to the laity."

languages.text: “很遗憾，你所寻求的信息处于教外人可接触的知识回路之外。”
languages.original_text: "Regrettably, the information you seek lies outside the circuit of knowledge accessible to the laity."

traits.locale_text: “很遗憾，你所寻求的信息处于教外人可接触的知识回路之外。”

languages.text: « Malheureusement, l'information que vous cherchez se trouve en dehors du circuit de connaissances accessible aux profanes. »
languages.original_text: "Regrettably, the information you seek lies outside the circuit of knowledge accessible to the laity."

traits.locale_text: « Malheureusement, l'information que vous cherchez se trouve en dehors du circuit de connaissances accessible aux profanes. »

languages.text: "Ne yazık ki aradığınız bilgi, ruhban dışı sınıfın erişebileceği irfan devresinin dışında yer almakta."
languages.original_text: "Regrettably, the information you seek lies outside the circuit of knowledge accessible to the laity."

traits.locale_text: "Ne yazık ki aradığınız bilgi, ruhban dışı sınıfın erişebileceği irfan devresinin dışında yer almakta."

languages.text: «Por desgracia, la información que busca se encuentra fuera del circuito de conocimiento accesible para los laicos».
languages.original_text: "Regrettably, the information you seek lies outside the circuit of knowledge accessible to the laity."

traits.locale_text: «Por desgracia, la información que busca se encuentra fuera del circuito de conocimiento accesible para los laicos».

languages.text: "Bedauerlicherweise liegen die von Euch gesuchten Informationen außerhalb des für Laien zugänglichen Wissensschaltkreises."
languages.original_text: "Regrettably, the information you seek lies outside the circuit of knowledge accessible to the laity."

traits.locale_text: "Bedauerlicherweise liegen die von Euch gesuchten Informationen außerhalb des für Laien zugänglichen Wissensschaltkreises."

languages.text: 「残念ながら、あなたが求めている情報は、一般の人々がアクセスできる知識の回路の外にあります。」
languages.original_text: "Regrettably, the information you seek lies outside the circuit of knowledge accessible to the laity."

traits.locale_text: 「残念ながら、あなたが求めている情報は、一般の人々がアクセスできる知識の回路の外にあります。」
